author: nflaig
content:
that's what claude is telling me
```
The connection dies at stream-muxer negotiation, right after noise → Unexpected EOF / MuxerUnavailableError. Lodestar reads no noise extensions from Nimbus (undefined), so it
  falls back to post-noise multistream-select; Nimbus closes the socket there. Teku sends a present (empty) extensions block and negotiates fine over the same path. → It's an
  early-muxer-negotiation interop mismatch between Lodestar's libp2p stack and this Nimbus build.
```

author: tersec
content: that's interesting
